## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on paid search strategy and its synergy with SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/2fZz5wiRE47Jqs9u1Tw8HMsAcMcoTkhq?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The sync was cut short by Don's unstable internet, preventing a discussion on paid search strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/2fZz5wiRE47Jqs9u1Tw8HMsAcMcoTkhq?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [The goal was to integrate paid search with SEO to scale reach and generate more Sales Qualified Leads (SQLs).](https://fathom.video/share/2fZz5wiRE47Jqs9u1Tw8HMsAcMcoTkhq?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Kyle Gaudreau (growthx.ai) was brought in as a paid search expert to answer Don's questions.](https://fathom.video/share/2fZz5wiRE47Jqs9u1Tw8HMsAcMcoTkhq?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)

## Topics

### Paid Search Strategy

  - [**Objective:** Scale reach and generate more SQLs by integrating paid search with SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/2fZz5wiRE47Jqs9u1Tw8HMsAcMcoTkhq?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Context:** Don sought guidance on modern paid search, noting its historical synergy with organic search and the impact of LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/2fZz5wiRE47Jqs9u1Tw8HMsAcMcoTkhq?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [**Expert Insight:** Kyle Gaudreau (growthx.ai) was present to provide expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/2fZz5wiRE47Jqs9u1Tw8HMsAcMcoTkhq?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
      - [**Initial Point:** Google is increasingly automating ad management, reducing advertiser control.](https://fathom.video/share/2fZz5wiRE47Jqs9u1Tw8HMsAcMcoTkhq?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [**Outcome:** The discussion stalled due to Don's unstable internet connection.](https://fathom.video/share/2fZz5wiRE47Jqs9u1Tw8HMsAcMcoTkhq?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie Chowske:** Reschedule the meeting with Don and Kyle for later this week.](https://fathom.video/share/2fZz5wiRE47Jqs9u1Tw8HMsAcMcoTkhq?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
